name: ace-receipts
description: AI agents can cook. Make them bring receipts. Tiny CLI + GitHub Action that scans AI-agent workflows and AI-generated diffs for proof, risk, permission, missing evidence, and closeout.
author: Hichem Benali

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/cli.test.js dist/test/diff-scanner.test.js dist/test/receipt.test.js dist/test/workflow-scanner.test.js
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js demo
